heading: Pyth-2 cow-equation continuation stabilized as an affine system, rational obstruction, and modular packet
text:
type: observation
tags: [qa, pyth2, cows, cattle-problem, affine-system]
body: Continued directly from the stabilized bulls answer row and diagram packet into the cow equations. `pyth2_cows_equations.py` now substitutes the fixed bulls values `W1=2226`, `X1=1602`, `Y1=891`, `Z1=1580` into equations (4) through (7), producing a stable affine system with offsets `1869/2`, `711`, `3267/10`, and `689`. Solving the original system exactly yields a unique rational point with denominator `4657`, not an integral cattle count: `W2=7206360/4657`, `X2=4893246/4657`, `Y2=5439213/4657`, `Z2=3515820/4657`. The page-124 continuation is therefore now stabilized first as a modular obstruction packet with congruences `X2 ≡ 6 mod 12`, `Z2 ≡ 0 mod 20`, `Y2 ≡ 9 mod 30`, and `W2 ≡ 0 mod 42`. The later claims are kept isolated rather than mixed into the validated lane: the proposed transposition of equations (6) and (7), the `9801` yellow-cows claim, and the triangular-number requirement all remain quarantined as source-layer ambiguities.
